TR9, cbleimirien fitirw [fa-479-111/4/1 3 9-7/10-3111T.2 -- 10 of 19 -- UI [117111I—(ty, 4 TO TT ; 314*-111-7 SMALL INDUSTRIES DEVELOPMENT BANK OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th February, 2011 General Amendment Regulations, 2011 F. No. 66n/CAD.— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub- section (1) and (2) of section 52 of the Small Industries Development Bank of India Act, 1989 (39 of 1989), read with Regulation 14(i) of the Small Industries Development Bank of India General Regulations, 2000, the Board, makes the following amendments to the Small Industries Development Bank of India General Regulations, 2000, namely:- These Regulations may be called Small Industries Development Bank of India General Amendment Regulations, 2011. They have come into force on January 06, 2011. The Schedule - Ito the Small Industries Development Bank of India General Regulations, 2000, shall be amended and substituted by the following Schedule - I :- SCHEDULE — I GENERAL FUND [See Regulation 14 (i)] Small Industries Development Bank of India Balance Sheet as at 31st March, 20 31.03.20 31.03.20 l ithwAre Amount Capital Reserves, Surplus and Funds Deposits CAPITAL AND LIABILITIES HE -- 11 of 19 -- Borrowing Other Liabilities and Provisions Deferred Tax Liability Total ASSETS IV V Cash and Bank Balances Investments Loans & Advances Fixed Assets Other Assets Total Contingent Liabilities XI X 12 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART 111—SEe. 4] Significant Accounting Policies XV Notes to Accounts XVI i)The Schedules referred to above form an integral part of the Balance Sheet H) Deferred Tax Asset / Liability will be disclosed, after netting off, on the Asset / Liability depending upon the balance available, Hi) The Schedules to the Financial Statements are indicative and not exhaustive and are subject to change based on the requirements of the Bank and the changing circumstances of business.
